tasks.description: Build the shared panel A verifier core on `geoquant/streaming-ui` to parse raw SSE, extract assistant JSONL, rebuild the tree, run validation/grading, and emit a normalized verifier report.
steps: Verify current branch is `geoquant/streaming-ui` before starting and before marking this task complete.
Run the shared verifier core against a captured panel A response and verify it outputs a normalized report with prompt, stream, tree, validation, grading, status, and reasons sections.
Verify the core reports zero-op output, non-renderable trees, malformed structure counts, repair counts, and grading totals without requiring browser render.
Verify the core can process assistant JSONL while ignoring reasoning chunks from the raw SSE stream.

tasks.description: Build a CLI-first panel A verifier runner on `geoquant/streaming-ui` that replays the exact `/api/chat` panel A payload, captures raw artifacts, and writes compact JSON and Markdown reports.
steps: Verify current branch is `geoquant/streaming-ui` before starting and before marking this task complete.
Run the CLI verifier with a panel A playground prompt and verify it sends the same payload shape as panel A, including supplements when present.
Verify the CLI writes `request.json`, `response.sse`, `assistant.jsonl`, `report.json`, and `report.md` into a timestamped artifact directory.
Verify the generated report summarizes prompt chars, token estimate, SSE bytes, assistant chars, JSONL line count, and patch op count.

tasks.description: Integrate panel A pre-render verifier gating on `geoquant/streaming-ui` so panel A uses `pass`, `warn`, and `fail` statuses before mounting generated output, while panel B stays unchanged.
steps: Verify current branch is `geoquant/streaming-ui` before starting and before marking this task complete.
Run a healthy panel A generation and verify status `pass` still renders panel A normally.
Run a borderline panel A generation and verify status `warn` renders panel A with verifier warnings surfaced.
Run a pathological panel A generation and verify status `fail` prevents panel A tree mount and surfaces verifier failure details instead of wedging the page.
Verify panel B request path and prompt semantics remain unchanged during the same flows.

tasks.description: Add compact verifier report surfacing for panel A on `geoquant/streaming-ui`, using existing playground summary/debug patterns without changing panel B semantics.
steps: Verify current branch is `geoquant/streaming-ui` before starting and before marking this task complete.
Verify the playground shows a compact verifier status badge or summary for panel A runs with `pass`, `warn`, and `fail` states.
Verify users can inspect top failure reasons and drill into raw JSONL, tree, or report details from the playground UI.
Verify the new verifier UI does not change panel B prompt behavior, panel B tab semantics, or panel B generation logic.

tasks.description: Add configurable back-pressure budgets on `geoquant/streaming-ui` for panel A verifier decisions, covering size, repairs, and malformed structure thresholds.
steps: Verify current branch is `geoquant/streaming-ui` before starting and before marking this task complete.
Verify verifier thresholds are read from a named config object rather than hardcoded UI conditionals.
Verify config includes prompt, stream, patch, depth, repair, stripped-prop, malformed-structure, unknown-type, and dropped-line limits.
Verify changing config values changes verifier pass/warn/fail outcomes without requiring component logic rewrites.

tasks.description: Add verifier fixtures and automated coverage on `geoquant/streaming-ui` for pass, warn, and fail panel A cases, including malformed compound structures and oversized streams.
steps: Verify current branch is `geoquant/streaming-ui` before starting and before marking this task complete.
Run automated tests covering pass, warn, and fail verifier outcomes from captured or synthetic panel A responses.
Verify tests cover malformed table-like compound structure, zero-op output, non-renderable tree, oversized response budget, and excessive repair counts.
Verify tests assert panel B remains unaffected by panel A verifier changes.

nonGoals: Fixing every generative compound-structure issue in Kumo
Implementing any of this work on a branch other than geoquant/streaming-ui
